name: SUPA Consolidated Inc.
summary: PART I . SUPA Consolidated Inc., formerly known as Tribal Rides International Corp., a Nevada corporation (the Company , we , or us ), was incorporated on May 19, 2014, as Trimax Consulting, Inc. On May 8, 2017, we changed our name to Xinda International Corp. On January 18, 2020, we entered into an Asset Purchase Agreement with Tribal Rides, Inc., a Nevada corporation ( Tribal Rides ), pursuant to which we purchased certain assets of Tribal Rides in exchange for the issuance of 25,000,000 share...
